privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate a new Tiddler from scratch. The expected title ('Machine Learning Pipeline Architecture'), expected tags ('Technology', 'MachineLearning'), minimum word count (100), and expected keywords ('data', 'model', 'training', 'pipeline') were all verified against the explicit task description instructions and the verifier scripts (export_result.sh and verifier.py) which strictly enforce these values.
